title: Kazakhstan President calls for human-centric AI, echoing India's vision
description: Kazakhstan's President Tokayev addressed the urgent call for fair global governance of artificial intelligence at a conference in Shanghai. He stressed the importance of offering equal development chances in the thriving AI sector for every nation. Promoting responsible human oversight, Tokayev stated that AI should enhance economic and societal well-being.

description: Another powerful new artificial intelligence model from China took the US tech industry by surprise Friday, the latest sign that Chinese startups that publicly release their “open-source” AI technology are making the California titans of AI sweat.

title: ₹8 Lakh Crore Investment Proposals in 18 Months; Chhattisgarh Tops Key Investor
description: Chhattisgarh has received investment proposals worth nearly Rs 8 lakh crore over the past 18 months and secured top rankings in regulatory ease and institutional environment in the CRISIL–NITI Aayog Investment Friendliness Index (IFI) 2026. The state also ranked second in environmental resilience, reflecting improvements in governance and ease of doing business. Investments have been proposed across sectors including semiconductors, artificial intelligence, textiles, pharmaceuticals and agro-processing.
content:
Chhattisgarh has attracted investment proposals of nearly ₹8 lakh crore in the past 18 months and emerged as the country’s top state on key parameters in the CRISIL–NITI Aayog Investment Friendliness Index (IFI) 2026, officials said on Sunday.

title: Pocket-size AI: Powerful phones star at China show

title: Emerging markets poised to outperform in H2 2026 amid attractive valuations, AI
description: Emerging markets are expected to remain well placed in the second half of 2026, with attractive valuations, easing inflation and monetary policy support likely to sustain their relative outperformance, while investors may increasingly favour equities linked to artificial intelligence and the broader technology cycle, according to a research report by HSBC.
